name: Midway Presbyterian Church
evidence: Pastor David Hall signed 2002 Knox Seminary Open Letter against Christian Zionism. Founder of the Kuyper Institute.

name: Parish Presbyterian Church
evidence: Pastor George Grant signed 2002 Knox Seminary Open Letter against Christian Zionism. Also associated with King's Meadow Study Center.

name: Bryce Avenue Presbyterian Church
evidence: Pastor Zachary Garris wrote 'No apologies: A Christian case for America before Israel' for The Blaze. Publicly opposes Christian Zionism from America-first framework. Active on X/Twitter.

name: New Life in Christ Church
evidence: Pastor Kittredge (d. 2024) wrote 'The Conflicting Narrative of Jerusalem' for The Aquila Report, presenting Palestinian narratives. Wrote 'Pray for the Peace of Jerusalem.' Supported churches in Bethlehem. Nearly 49 years as pastor.
